67a17e3c1d2f4b8a9c5e0d01 description:
For Humanity: You placed your trust in Mae - a step far beyond the mere instinct to survive.
The strike against TerraGroup tore apart their mask: secrets were laid bare, corrupt politicians lost their power, and humanity cast off its chains and breathed free.
People realized they could live differently, without descending into ruin. You escaped from Tarkov, but with you, the truth broke free as well.
You did it for the sake of all of us.
